word: G5240 - ὑπερεκχύνω - hyperekchýnō - hoop-er-ek-khoo'-no - Run over

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to pour out beyond measure; passive, to overflow, run over
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G5228 and the alternate form of G1632; to pour out over, that is, (passively) to overflow: - run over.
